creator: phd_kimberlite@yahoo.co.jp
text:
Hi, submitter,

Thank you for reporting this PR.
However your error seems to have occurred during fetch stage,
and the port was successfully built on tinderbox on 10-CURRENT/amd64.
https://redports.org/buildarchive/20120911112627-91438/
So please fetch openblas distfile manually, and place it in your distdir.

If the fetch error is fixed by applying a patch to fetch(1),
I think that it is not 'ports' problem but 'userland' problem.

If you find any fix or workaround,
for example,
* modify distfiles (https -> http)
* modify FETCH_ARGS variable
please send me a diff to the port.
I will approve it as needed.

Thanks,
Shibusawa
